scripts.build:app: pnpm -s prepare:webgal && pnpm -s check:webgal && pnpm --filter @tuanchat/web run build && pnpm -s sync:web-build && pnpm -s compile
scripts.build: pnpm -s build:app && pnpm --workspace-root exec electron-builder build --config apps/desktop/electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.build:win:zip: pnpm -s build:app && pnpm --workspace-root exec electron-builder build --config apps/desktop/electron-builder.config.cjs --win zip
scripts.build:win:nsis: pnpm -s build:app && pnpm --workspace-root exec electron-builder build --config apps/desktop/electron-builder.config.cjs --win nsis
scripts.build:mac:zip: pnpm -s build:app && pnpm --workspace-root exec electron-builder build --config apps/desktop/electron-builder.config.cjs --mac zip
scripts.build:mac:dmg: pnpm -s build:app && pnpm --workspace-root exec electron-builder build --config apps/desktop/electron-builder.config.cjs --mac dmg
